name: Eat Me Alive
short_description: In dependency of where in the body you are positioned, you get different boni. In general you will get Bone, Blood and Tissue with which you can create more bugs. In addition to that you will be able to research different bug types which have boni themself.
detailed_description:
You are the bug!


You decide the best body part to settle into. Create offspring and keep evolving into a better self.
But be aware of your human host, you do not want to upset or even kill it.

▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬●▬

The goal of the game is to find a good balance between getting your ressources without
upsetting the host. You can place yourself on any body part to get different ressources.
Also by researching different genetic evolutions you can place bugs with distinct
features.
